name: Standard Deviation Calculator
description: Industrial-grade standard deviation calculator for process variability analysis, compliant with ISO 5725, Six Sigma, and Lean manufacturing standards.

inputs.label: Data Points (comma or space separated)
inputs.businessContext: Raw measurements from process output, e.g., dimensions, weights, cycle times.

label_i18n.fr: Points de données (séparés par des virgules ou des espaces)
label_i18n.es: Puntos de datos (separados por coma o espacio)

businessContext_i18n.en: Raw measurements from process output, e.g., dimensions, weights, cycle times.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Süreç çıktısından alınan ham ölçümler, örn. boyutlar, ağırlıklar, çevrim süreleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rohmessungen aus dem Prozessoutput, z. B. Abmessungen, Gewichte, Zykluszeiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesures brutes de la sortie du processus, par exemple dimensions, poids, temps de cycle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Mediciones brutas de la salida del proceso, p. ej., dimensiones, pesos, tiempos de ciclo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القياسات الخام من مخرجات العملية، مثل الأبعاد والأوزان وأوقات الدورة.

inputs.label: Sample Size (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of observations in the sample. Must be at least 2 for standard deviation calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of observations in the sample. Must be at least 2 for standard deviation calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Örneklemdeki gözlem sayısı. Standart sapma hesaplaması için en az 2 olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Beobachtungen in der Stichprobe. Für die Standardabweichungsberechnung mindestens 2 erforderlich.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'observations dans l'échantillon. Doit être au moins 2 pour le calcul de l'écart type.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de observaciones en la muestra. Debe ser al menos 2 para el cálculo de la desviación estándar.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد المشاهدات في العينة. يجب أن يكون 2 على الأقل لحساب الانحراف المعياري.

inputs.label: Data Type
inputs.businessContext: Continuous data (e.g., length, time) vs discrete (e.g., count of defects). Affects interpretation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Continuous data (e.g., length, time) vs discrete (e.g., count of defects). Affects interpretation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sürekli veri (örn. uzunluk, süre) vs ayrık (örn. kusur sayısı). Yorumlamayı etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kontinuierliche Daten (z. B. Länge, Zeit) vs. diskrete (z. B. Anzahl der Fehler). Beeinflusst die Interpretation.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Données continues (ex. longueur, temps) vs discrètes (ex. nombre de défauts). Affecte l'interprétation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Datos continuos (p. ej., longitud, tiempo) vs discretos (p. ej., recuento de defectos). Afecta la interpretación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: بيانات مستمرة (مثل الطول والوقت) مقابل بيانات منفصلة (مثل عدد العيوب). يؤثر على التفسير.

inputs.label: Population or Sample?
inputs.businessContext: Select 'population' if data covers entire population (n=N), else 'sample' for Bessel's correction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select 'population' if data covers entire population (n=N), else 'sample' for Bessel's correction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Veriler tüm popülasyonu kapsıyorsa 'popülasyon' (n=N), aksi halde Bessel düzeltmesi için 'örneklem' seçin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie 'Grundgesamtheit', wenn die Daten die gesamte Population abdecken (n=N), sonst 'Stichprobe' für die Bessel-Korrektur.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez 'population' si les données couvrent toute la population (n=N), sinon 'échantillon' pour la correction de Bessel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione 'población' si los datos cubren toda la población (n=N), si no 'muestra' para la corrección de Bessel.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختر 'المجتمع' إذا كانت البيانات تغطي المجتمع بأكمله (n=N)، وإلا اختر 'عينة' لتصحيح بيسل.

inputs.label: Unit of Measure
inputs.businessContext: Physical unit of the data points (e.g., mm, sec, kg). Used for output labeling.

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical unit of the data points (e.g., mm, sec, kg). Used for output labeling.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Veri noktalarının fiziksel birimi (örn. mm, sn, kg). Çıktı etiketlemesi için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Physikalische Einheit der Datenpunkte (z. B. mm, s, kg). Wird für die Ausgabebeschriftung verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Unité physique des points de données (ex. mm, s, kg). Utilisée pour l'étiquetage des résultats.
businessContext_i18n.es: Unidad física de los puntos de datos (p. ej., mm, seg, kg). Se usa para etiquetar la salida.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوحدة الفيزيائية لنقاط البيانات (مثل مم، ثانية، كجم). تستخدم لتسمية المخرجات.

inputs.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
inputs.businessContext: Lower bound of acceptable process output per engineering specifications.

businessContext_i18n.en: Lower bound of acceptable process output per engineering specifications.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mühendislik spesifikasyonlarına göre kabul edilebilir süreç çıktısının alt sınırı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Untere Grenze des akzeptablen Prozessoutputs gemäß technischen Spezifikationen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Limite inférieure de la sortie acceptable du processus selon les spécifications techniques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Límite inferior de la salida del proceso aceptable según las especificaciones de ingeniería.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحد الأدنى لمخرجات العملية المقبولة وفقًا للمواصفات الهندسية.

inputs.label: Upper Specification Limit (USL)
inputs.businessContext: Upper bound of acceptable process output per engineering specifications.

businessContext_i18n.en: Upper bound of acceptable process output per engineering specifications.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mühendislik spesifikasyonlarına göre kabul edilebilir süreç çıktısının üst sınırı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Obere Grenze des akzeptablen Prozessoutputs gemäß technischen Spezifikationen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Limite supérieure de la sortie acceptable du processus selon les spécifications techniques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Límite superior del proceso aceptable según especificaciones de ingeniería.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحد الأعلى لمخرجات العملية المقبولة وفقًا للمواصفات الهندسية.

inputs.label: Target Value (Nominal)
inputs.businessContext: Ideal process target, often the midpoint of specification limits.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ideal process target, often the midpoint of specification limits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İdeal süreç hedefi, genellikle spesifikasyon limitlerinin orta noktası.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ideales Prozessziel, oft der Mittelpunkt der Spezifikationsgrenzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Cible idéale du processus, souvent le point médian des limites de spécification.
businessContext_i18n.es: Objetivo ideal del proceso, a menudo el punto medio de los límites de especificación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: هدف العملية المثالي، غالبًا نقطة منتصف حدود المواصفات.

rules.message: Sample size must be at least 2 to compute standard deviation.
Number of data points provided must equal the sample size.
Lower specification limit must be less than upper specification limit.
Target value should lie within specification limits for optimal process centering.

thresholds.message: Process variation exceeds 1/6 of tolerance band (Cp < 1.0). Improvement needed.
Process variation moderate (Cp between 1.0 and 1.33). Consider tightening.
Process mean is off-target by more than 0.5 sigma. Adjust centering.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
